name: Elena Revicheva
resume_text: Elena Revicheva - AI Engineer and Fractional CTO. Built and deployed 10 autonomous AI agents including VJH (LangGraph autonomous job hunter), EspaLuz (WhatsApp + Telegram Spanish tutor with PayPal subscriptions), AIdeazz CTO AIPA (TypeScript webhook hub), and EspaLuz Influencer (automated content pipeline). Expert in multi-agent orchestration, RAG, BrightData scraping, and production AI systems on Oracle Cloud.
key_achievements: Built VJH: LangGraph autonomous job hunter processing 2000+ jobs/cycle with 4-layer eval harness, 129/129 passing
Deployed EspaLuz: live WhatsApp + Telegram Spanish tutor with real paying subscribers
Built /api/crm-event webhook hub: 5 agents feeding HubSpot pipeline in real-time
Integrated BrightData Web Unlocker: 120 LinkedIn jobs/cycle plus company enrichment
10 autonomous AI agents running 24/7 on Oracle Cloud
